name: Custom — T1059.004 Unix Shell via Non-Standard Port [Lab POV]
description: Fires if the native analytics misses the reverse shell pattern.
xql_query: dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = PROCESS | filter action_process_image_name = "bash" | filter action_process_command_line contains "/dev/tcp/" | fields agent_hostname, actor_process_image_name, action_process_command_line, event_timestamp
